title: DeathCounter Plus
description: Tracks and displays player death count with customizable on-screen counter and statistics
body:
**DeathCounter Plus**

Adds a simple yet useful death tracking system to your Minecraft experience. The mod displays your total death count directly on your screen, allowing you to monitor your survival progress at a glance.

## Key Features:

Persistent on-screen death counter that tracks every death
Toggle the counter display on/off
Lightweight and performance-friendly implementation
Clean, non-intrusive display that doesn't obstruct gameplay

## Command:
- /dc_toggl


Perfect for players who want to track their deaths during hardcore challenges, speedruns, or simply keep statistics of their survival journey. The ability to toggle the display means you can hide it during screenshots or when you don't need it, then bring it back instantly with a simple command.

My YouTube Channel 😼🦈↓ https://youtube.com/@nekozame_nyagi_garo I mainly post videos of my own mods. Please check this out!!

All my mods are completely free to use.
If you'd like to support development, consider buying me a coffee!
☕ https://ko-fi.com/nekozame_garo
